title: Seismic LiveDoc Template
description: A LiveDoc template in the Seismic platform used for dynamic document generation by merging data into predefined layouts.

outputFormats.description: Supported output formats for this template.

folderId.description: ID of the folder containing this template.

inputCount.description: Number of input fields defined in the template.

dataSourceId.description: ID of the default data source for this template.

inputs.description: Input field definitions for the template.

createdBy.description: ID of the user who created the template.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the template was created.

modifiedBy.description: ID of the user who last modified the template.

modifiedAt.description: Timestamp when the template was last modified.

thumbnailUrl.description: URL for the template thumbnail image.

TemplateInput.description: An input field definition for a LiveDoc template.

id.description: Unique identifier of the input field.

name.description: Name of the input field used as key in generation requests.

displayName.description: Display label for the input field.

type.description: Data type of the input field.

required.description: Whether the input field is required for generation.

defaultValue.description: Default value for the input field.

description.description: Description or help text for the input field.

dataSourceField.description: Name of the data source field this input maps to for automatic population.
